userTokenName.description: A human-readable name to identify the user token.

scopeNames.description: The set of permission scope names to grant to this token. Available scopes: etoro-public:trade.real:read, etoro-public:trade.real:write, etoro-public:trade.demo:read, etoro-public:trade.demo:write.

ipsWhitelist.description: An optional set of IPv4 addresses allowed to use this token.

expiresAt.description: An optional expiration date and time for the token in UTC.
